semantic.role: Defines layered architecture constraints to enforce domain isolation and proper layer dependencies.
responsibilities: Specify that domain modules must not depend on infrastructure or CLI layers.
Ensure domain modules depend only on internal domain logic or generic utilities.
Mandate that API layers can only call Service or Domain layers, preventing bypass of business logic.
outOfScope: Conventions for naming, file organization, or technology choices.
Implementation details of specific frameworks or tools.

English.purpose: To maintain a clean layered architecture by preventing reverse dependencies and ensuring that each layer adheres to its defined responsibilities.
English.context_and_audience: This document is intended for developers and code reviewers who need to enforce architectural constraints within a project. It serves as a rule set for both human review and automated compliance checking.
key_takeaways: Domain layer must be pure and independent of infrastructure or presentation concerns.
Domain should only depend on internal domain logic or generic utilities.
API layers must route through Service or Domain layers, not bypass business logic.
Violations are treated as errors or warnings with clear rationale.
